title: Statues
body:
## Adds pose-able stone statues!
which can be **crafted like this**:

![The crafting recipe, 3 stone and 2 stone slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14bc8c7258176b8ced048ccb8013665c16febc9b.png)

**The statues can be broken with a pickaxe** and **posed by clicking them while sneaking** to open this UI:

![A UI to pose statues](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ba4bc27448a2343a69f1e5a972900c09f344924.png)

Please **check the gallery** for extra showcases, aswell as the **Discord server if you need support**!

<big>**Requires [Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api)**</big>
